'''Doolis Podrace Arena''' was a [[Podracing/Legends|Podracing]] course within the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Doolis]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Caprioril]]. When the efforts of the anti-[[Podracing/Legends|Podracing]] organization known as the [[Ratts Tyerell Foundation/Legends|Ratts Tyerell Foundation]] lead to Podracing being outlawed on Caprioril in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], proconsul [[Shren Whist]] announced the arena would be shut down. There were plans for the facility to then be used for another purpose, although what exactly was not immediately determined. The closing of the arena was later reported on by [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]].<ref name="Hnn" />

==Behind the scenes==
The arena was first mentioned in the [[in-universe]] ''[[HoloNet News Vol. 531 45]]'' article "Podracing Banned on Caprioril", which was released in [[2002]] on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News]] website.
